artifactSummary.observedReportDefect: Complete internal alpha report still lacks direct current-stock/population evidence for the claimed 235000+ asylum-domain population. The report cites contextual total population, annual asylum applications, and EU/EFTA foreign resident count only.
artifactSummary.qualityImplication: The no-parser source-native preview/query repair did not materially improve the Swiss asylum-stock report. Next source-quality work should move beyond search preview/cap tweaks toward a bounded source-native official record/document/spreadsheet strategy.
